description: Runtime portable-package input manifest. Repository entries are copied from source; published application payloads are copied only from an external RuntimePublishRoot.

releaseContract.runtimePayloadSource: external RuntimePublishRoot only; repository bin/obj/x64 binaries are rejected
releaseContract.operatorDiagnostics: install/run expose read-only selected-provider prerequisites, VM profile, guest transport, guest payload, VT key, runtime-root, and RuntimePublishRoot guidance; optional runtime publish entries are recorded in package-manifest.generated.json when skipped for layout dry-runs, while handoff uses -RequireCompleteRuntimePayloads; generated reviewerChecklist and sourceRuntimeSafetyMetadata identify source/runtime safety boundaries; package/readiness do not use GUI signing fallback or CSignTool. Machine-readable installModeContract documents existing environment, checkpoint/snapshot restore boundaries, fresh/create local setup, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and explicit package/readiness non-mutation with Chinese gap next actions.
releaseContract.machineReadableGapAudit: package-manifest.generated.json:gapAudit and release-readiness.json:gapAudit use ksword.release.gap-audit.v28 and cover no fresh live evidence, three-provider parity live evidence, RuntimePublishRoot completeness, self-noise guard readiness, no VM mutation/no signing guardrails, and component progress
releaseContract.runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics: package-manifest.generated.json:operatorDiagnostics.runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics and release-readiness.json:gapAudit.runtimePublishRootCompleteness expose root placement, expected runtimePublish entries, missing/empty/incomplete counts, expected leaf gaps, forbidden-file previews, and handoffAllowed
releaseContract.noFreshLiveGuardrail: package/readiness do not generate fresh live evidence; release notes must say 本候选未刷新 fresh live evidence unless a lab job id is recorded
releaseContract.providerParityLiveEvidenceGuardrail: a three-provider parity claim requires independent HyperV, VMware, and Qemu Windows lab jobs from the same full gitCommit with gitDirty=false and gitChangedFileCount=0, the same sampleSha256/sampleSizeBytes/requestedDurationSeconds, host acceleration and selected-provider readiness, provider resource identity, completed background execution, runbookExecutionPath, final report paths, and a ksword.provider-parity-evidence.v1 artifact with validated=true; one provider job cannot prove the other two
releaseContract.machineReadableExecutionBoundaries: package-manifest.generated.json:executionBoundaries and release-readiness.json:executionBoundaries explicitly list no smoke, no provider live, no signing, no CSignTool, no push/publish
releaseContract.machineReadableRequiredEvidenceFields: package-manifest.generated.json:requiredEvidenceFields and release-readiness.json:requiredEvidenceFields list branch, commit, dirty status, runtime handoff fields, fresh-live claim fields, and independent HyperV/VMware/Qemu provider-parity claim fields
releaseContract.gitProvenanceFields: package-manifest.generated.json:gitMetadata and release-readiness.json:gitMetadata include branch, full commit, short commit, dirtyStatus, statusCount, and statusPreview

nextActionsZh: 下一步：先跑 Status/CheckEnvironment；若 RecommendedActions 为空，再启动 WebUI 或 PlanOnly。

modes.titleZh: 恢复或确认已有干净基线
modes.mutationCondition: Hyper-V checkpoint, VMware snapshot, and QEMU internal snapshot require provider mutation; QEMU per-job overlay satisfies the clean-baseline request without in-place mutation.
modes.packageReadinessMutation: provider restore forbidden; package/readiness only records QEMU overlay equivalence metadata and diagnostics
nextActionsZh: 下一步：readiness/package 不执行 provider restore；QEMU per-job overlay 可用无变更 JSON 命令确认干净基线，其他快照路径只有隔离 lab 操作者显式 -AllowVmMutation -Confirm/-Force 才能真实恢复。

modes.packageReadinessMutation: none; installer may write local config/secret only when operator runs it directly
nextActionsZh: 下一步：首机先确认 Windows、所选 provider 管理工具和硬件虚拟化能力，手工创建/导入 VM 和 clean baseline，再运行 .\install.ps1 推荐安装向导写本机 config/secret/payload。

modes.titleZh: 恢复或确认 clean baseline 边界
modes.packageReadinessMutation: provider restore forbidden; QEMU overlay equivalence is metadata-only during package/readiness

modes.titleZh: 首次/新机器本机配置流程
modes.packageReadinessMutation: none; package/readiness do not create VM/checkpoint/payload
none; package/readiness do not probe or mutate live host prerequisites

boundaries: source/package/readiness are low-side-effect and do not require live virtualization

supported Hyper-V, VMware Workstation Pro (vmType=ws), and QEMU WHPX live paths require Windows_NT, the selected provider management tool, hardware virtualization, an existing VM, a clean baseline, and guest transport
Runtime payloads must come from an external RuntimePublishRoot
VirusTotal is optional hash-only enrichment and is unrelated to Intel VT-x/AMD-V

modes.packageReadinessMutation: no installer modes, no CheckEnvironment execution, no VM start/restore/stop, no signing, no push/publish, no fresh live evidence

nextActionsZhWhenMissing: 下一步：补齐 releaseContract.installModeContract.modeIds 中缺失的安装模式。
下一步：重新生成 package-manifest.generated.json/release-readiness.json，确认 installContractGaps 为空。
下一步：不要通过 readiness/package 运行 install、任何 provider live、VM mutation、签名或 push/publish。

readinessPackageNonMutation.chinese: 中文：readiness/package 只生成 metadata/staging，不运行安装模式、不启动/还原/停止 VM、不签名、不 push/publish。

releaseContract.machineReadableInstallModeContract: package-manifest.generated.json:installModeContract and release-readiness.json:installModeContract cover existing-environment, restore-checkpoint-snapshot, fresh-create-flow, first-computer-prerequisites, compatibility-boundaries, and readiness-package-non-mutation.
releaseContract.installContractGapMetadata: installContractGapDetected, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh provide Chinese next actions when manifest/package/readiness install contract gaps are detected.
releaseContract.readinessPackageNonMutationExplicit: package/readiness execute no installer modes, no CheckEnvironment, no VM start/restore/stop, no driver signing, no CSignTool, no git push, and no network publish.

contains: package kind, version, source revision, branch, dirty-state preview
runtime publish root provenance when supplied
staged file inventory with sizeBytes and sha256 for payload files
skipped optional runtime publish entries and remediation context
generated reviewerChecklist for source/runtime handoff, release-note fields, and hard reject conditions
sourceRuntimeSafetyMetadata declaring source-only/source exclusions, external RuntimePublishRoot-only runtime payloads, and non-mutating safety state
safety contract for secrets, VM state, runtime evidence, signing, GUI signing fallback, push/publish, and CSignTool
machine-readable componentProgress snapshot for deployment/productization review

machine-readable gapAudit v28 snapshot for no fresh live evidence, three-provider parity live evidence, RuntimePublishRoot completeness, no VM mutation/no signing guardrails, self-noise guard readiness, and component progress
operatorDiagnostics.runtimePublishRootDiagnostics and runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics for package manifest clarity
executionBoundaries declaring smoke/live/signing/CSignTool/push were not executed
gitMetadata with branch, full commit, short commit, dirty status, status count, and preview
requiredEvidenceFields for source handoff, runtime handoff, fresh live claims, and independent HyperV/VMware/Qemu parity claims
runtimeHandoffMissingNextActionsZh with Chinese next actions when complete RuntimePublishRoot handoff is missing
reviewerChecklist JSON and no-fresh-live guardrail fields
installModeContract for existing environment, restore checkpoint/snapshot boundary, fresh/create flow, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and readiness/package non-mutation
installContractGapDetected, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh with Chinese next actions when install contract metadata is incomplete
stagedMetadata.selfHashNote: The generated manifest lists itself in files but omits a recursive self-hash from fileInventory.

include.note: Expected external publish output for KSword.Sandbox.Web.
Expected external staged guest payload root produced by scripts/Prepare-GuestPayload.ps1 or a release pipeline.
Expected external publish output for KSword.Sandbox.JobTool.
Expected external publish output for KSword.Sandbox.PostProcess.

requiredChecks: Published runtime payloads must come from an external RuntimePublishRoot, not from repository bin/obj/x64 folders; use -RequireCompleteRuntimePayloads for runtime handoff builds.
Do not package submitted samples, VM disks/checkpoints, local reports, packet captures, memory dumps, signed driver binaries, or private signing material.
Do not package local state such as sandbox.local.json, install-state.json, guest-password.dpapi, .env files, API keys, or user secret files.
The package script stages and zips locally only; publishing/pushing remains a separate manual release-manager action.
package-manifest.generated.json and release-readiness.json must expose executionBoundaries: no smoke, no provider live, no signing, no CSignTool, no push/publish.
Machine-readable handoff evidence must include branch, commit, dirty status, requiredEvidenceFields, and Chinese next actions when complete RuntimePublishRoot handoff is missing.

A three-provider parity claim must include independent HyperV, VMware, and Qemu evidence records from the same full gitCommit with gitDirty=false and gitChangedFileCount=0, the same sample SHA-256/byte size/requested duration, host acceleration and selected-provider readiness, provider resource identity, completed background execution, distinct jobId, runbookExecutionPath, final report paths, and a ksword.provider-parity-evidence.v1 artifact with validated=true; one provider job cannot substitute for another.

Generated package/readiness metadata must include installModeContract, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh covering existing environment, restore checkpoint/snapshot, fresh/create flow, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and package/readiness non-mutation.

componentProgressTemplate.purpose: Machine-readable deployment/productization progress for release reviewers; not fresh live evidence.

components.handoffGate: external RuntimePublishRoot; host-web, guest-tools, tools/job-tool, tools/postprocess; no repository bin/obj/x64 fallback
runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics.summary.missingCount = 0, incompleteCount = 0, forbiddenFileCount = 0, and handoffAllowed = true before runtime handoff
exclude samples, reports, VM state, generated artifacts, secrets, signing material, CSignTool
PowerShell parse, repository policy, source StageOnly dry-run; no provider live/heavy E2E
fresh live claims require explicit lab job id, commit, runtime root, timestamp, and report paths

three-provider parity requires independent HyperV, VMware, and Qemu Windows lab evidence from the same clean full commit and sample, covering the same acceptance rows, plus validated aggregate evidence
static rules/docs audit confirms self-noise, collection-health, VT quiet state, and behaviorCounted=false boundaries without smoke/live
Chinese next-step remediation is present in readiness/package/install/run output
installModeContract mode ids present; installContractGaps empty; Chinese installContractGapNextActionsZh present when gaps are detected; package/readiness non-mutation explicit
